title: Workshop Materials
content:
The following materials are drawn from workshops given by the MIT Data Management Group with in MIT Libraries.
Introduction to Research Data Management (PDF) Research Data Management: Sharing and Storage (PDF)
Resources for Data Sharing and Storage (PDF) Data Management Plans and the DMPTool (PDF)
DMPT Quickstart Guide File Organization (PDF - 3.1MB)
Research Projects: File Structure and Naming (PDF) Version Control (PDF) Using Metadata to Find, Interpret, and Share Data (PDF - 6.3MB)
